content:
🌟 browserytools | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing a private, offline suite of essential browser-based tools for everyday productivity tasks like file conversion, image editing, text manipulation, and data processing.
✨ Key Features: • AI-powered background removal • Image compression and format conversion • PDF manipulation (merge, split, compress)
📖 Summary: BrowseryTools is a collection of over 80 browser-based utility tools built with Next.js and TypeScript. These tools operate entirely client-side, ensuring user privacy and eliminating the need for server uploads or accounts. They cover a wide range of functionalities including image manipulation, file conversion, text processing, data handling, and calculations.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
